title: Twist Bioscience Corp (TWST) Q2 2025 Earnings Call Highlights: Record Revenue and Strategic Developments
text: Twist Bioscience reported strong Q2 2025 financial results, achieving record revenue of $92.8 million, representing a 23% year-over-year increase. The company demonstrated improved operational efficiency with gross margins reaching 49.6%. The biotechnology firm generated revenue across three segments: SynBio ($36 million, +21% YoY), NGS ($51.1 million, +25% YoY), and Biopharma Services ($5.7 million, +21% YoY). Despite these gains, the company reported an adjusted EBITDA loss of approximately $14.8 million, though this marked an $11.9 million improvement versus the prior year. Twist completed a spinoff of its DNA Data Storage division into Atlas Data Storage, securing $155 million in funding. This separation is expected to generate approximately $5 million in quarterly savings. Management projects fiscal 2025 revenue between $372-379 million (approximately 20% growth at midpoint), with Q3 guidance of $94-97 million representing roughly 17% growth compared to the prior year quarter. The company continues targeting adjusted EBITDA breakeven by fiscal 2026's end and faces headwinds from academic funding pressures and potential tariff impacts on supply chains.
